capabilities.name: Form builder
capabilities.notes: Skill surface missing — no form-definition skill; only manage_form_submissions exists in skillSeeds.

capabilities.name: Submissions → leads
capabilities.verify: createLeadFromForm in FormBlock.tsx (src/lib/lead-utils); leads visible in LeadsPage
capabilities.notes: Automatic runtime pipeline + UI; no skill surface for the conversion itself.

capabilities.name: Spam protection
capabilities.verify: honeypot field (off-screen) + 800ms time-trap in FormBlock.tsx — bot submissions dropped silently; build-verified

capabilities.name: Submission notifications
capabilities.verify: notifyEmail setting in FormBlockEditor; FormBlock emails it on submit via send-contact-email (fetch+publishable-key pattern). Verified on demo: HTTP 200 success (simulated — no provider). Plus the existing form.submitted webhook event.

capabilities.name: Custom field types
capabilities.verify: text/email/phone/textarea/checkbox + select/radio/date/number in FormBlockEditor (options UI) and FormBlock public render; build-verified
capabilities.notes: Added select/radio (with options), date, number field types.

capabilities.name: File upload fields
capabilities.verify: file field type (accept + max-size settings) in FormBlockEditor; FormBlock uploads to private form-uploads bucket on submit; FormSubmissionsPage signed-URL downloads. Verified on demo: anon upload OK, anon read denied (private), bucket RLS applied
capabilities.notes: Private 10MB bucket + RLS (anon insert, admin read/delete). Recruiting/CV pipeline (extract-pdf-text→parse-resume) is the natural follow-on.

capabilities.name: Submission management (list/get/stats/delete)
capabilities.notes: Added: full submission admin on both surfaces.
